metadata.title: ActionResult — universal atomic action result contract

description: Universal result contract for all atomic actions in CORE (src/shared/action_types.py). Every AtomicAction must return an ActionResult. Critical risk: ConstitutionalViolationError provenance stored in the data dict is silently lost if required fields drift from this contract. CommandResult is a backward-compat module-level alias for ActionResult — not a separate governed class. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

action_id.description: The registered AtomicAction identifier that produced this result.

ok.description: True if the action succeeded; False if it failed. Downstream consumers must check ok before inspecting data.

data.description: Action-specific result payload. For failed actions carries failure context including ConstitutionalViolationError provenance. Shape is action-specific; ungoverned beyond dict[str, Any] today.

impact.description: ActionImpact classification (ActionImpact | None). Governed vocabulary: action_impact enum in .intent/META/enums.json. Values: read-only, write-metadata, write-code, write-data. None if not set at creation.

logs.description: Informational log lines from action execution.

suggestions.description: Remediation suggestions for failed or partial results.
